briefdescription.para: Construct an empty rectangle at (0,0).

memberdef.argsstring: (Coordinate x, Coordinate y, Coordinate width, Coordinate height) noexcept
memberdef.name: Rectangle

briefdescription.para: Construct from explicit position and size values.
Construct from position and size objects.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Position topLeft, const Position bottomRight) noexcept
memberdef.name: Rectangle

briefdescription.para: Construct from a top-left and bottom-right (exclusive) corner position.

detaileddescription.para:
If the bottom right is left or above the top-left corner, the rectangle will be empty.
topLeft
The top-left corner inside the new rectangle.
bottomRight
The bottom-right corner outside the new rectangle.

briefdescription.para: Compare two rectangles.
Compare two rectangles.
Merge two rectangles into a larger one that holds both rectangles.
Expand this rectangle to include another rectangle.
Intersect two rectangles to get only the overlapping part.

detaileddescription.para: If the two rectangles don't overlap, return an empty rectangle.

briefdescription.para: Change this rectangle to the intersection of both rectangles.

detaileddescription.para: If the two rectangles don't overlap, its size will be (0,0).

briefdescription.para: Get the top-left corner position.
Set the top-left corner position.
Get the size of the rectangle.
Set the size of the rectangle.
Left x-coordinate.
Top y-coordinate.
Right x-coordinate (exclusive).
Bottom y-coordinate (exclusive).
Top-left corner position.
Top-right corner position (x-coordinate exclusive).
Bottom-left corner position (y-coordinate exclusive).
Bottom-right corner position (x-coordinate exclusive, y-coordinate exclusive).
Rectangle width.
Rectangle height.
Position of a given anchor within this rectangle.

simplesect.para: The position inside this rectangle matching the requested anchor.

briefdescription.para: Center position.

detaileddescription.para: This is equal to the position of the Anchor::Center anchor.

briefdescription.para: Check if a position is inside the rectangle.

simplesect.para: true if the position lies inside the rectangle bounds.

briefdescription.para: Checks if another rectangle fits into this one.

detaileddescription.para:
Only true if every position of the tested rectangle is inside this one.
testedRectangle
The rectangle to test for containment.
true if the tested rectangle is fully contained within this one.

briefdescription.para: Check if another rectangle overlaps this one.

detaileddescription.para:
Overlapping is when both rectangles share at least one position.
testedRectangle
The rectangle to test for overlap.

briefdescription.para: Check if a position lies on the rectangle frame.

simplesect.para: true if the position lies on the outer frame of the rectangle.

briefdescription.para: Get a hash for this rectangle.
Clamp a position to this rectangle.

simplesect.para: The clamped position where (x1 <= position.x <= x2) && (y1 <= position.y <= y2)

briefdescription.para: Create a rectangle expanded by the provided margins.

parameterdescription.para: Margins to apply; positive values expand outward.

briefdescription.para: Create a rectangle inset by the provided margins.

parameterdescription.para: Margins to remove from each side.

memberdef.argsstring: (Anchor anchor, Size size, Margins margins) const noexcept
memberdef.name: subRectangle

briefdescription.para: Create a sub-rectangle inside this rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The size. Zero means full width/height.
The margins around the sub rectangle.

briefdescription.para: Compute the position for content aligned inside this rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
If contentSize is larger than this rectangle on an axis, the returned position on that axis lies before topLeft() on that axis.
contentSize
The aligned content size.
alignment
The alignment for the content.
The aligned content position relative to the global coordinate space.

briefdescription.para: Align a source rectangle inside this rectangle and crop the larger side according to the alignment.

detaileddescription.para:
If the source is smaller than this rectangle on an axis, the returned target rectangle is moved inside this rectangle. If the source is larger on an axis, the returned source rectangle is cropped on that axis.
sourceRect
The source rectangle before alignment and cropping.
alignment
The alignment used for placement or cropping.
The effective target rectangle and source rectangle after alignment.

briefdescription.para: Get the clockwise border index for a frame position.

detaileddescription.para:
The top-left corner has index 0, then the index increases clockwise around the perimeter. Degenerate rectangles with width or height 1 still produce a continuous index sequence.
testedPosition
The position on the frame.
The clockwise border index, or -1 if the position is not on the frame.

briefdescription.para: Get the frame direction for a given position in this rectangle.

simplesect.para: The direction of the frame at the given position, or Direction::None if the position is not on the frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (int rows, int columns, Coordinate horizontalSpacing=0, Coordinate verticalSpacing=0) const
memberdef.name: gridCells

briefdescription.para: Divide this rectangle into equally spaced grid cells.

detaileddescription.para:
Each cell must be at least 1x1 in size, if this isn't possible, std::invalid_argument is thrown.
rows
The number of rows. Minimum 1.
columns
The number of columns. Minimum 1
horizontalSpacing
The spacing between cells horizontally.
verticalSpacing
The spacing between cells vertically.
A vector of rectangles representing the grid cells from left to right, top to bottom.
std::invalid_argument
if rows or columns are less than 1 or the chosen division is impossible.

briefdescription.para: Call a function for each position contained in the rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: A callable with signature void(Position). The function definition must be void fn(Position pos).

briefdescription.para: Call a function for each position around the frame, clockwise with index.

parameterdescription.para: A callable with signature void(Position, int). The function definition must be void fn(Position pos, int index).

briefdescription.para: Get the bounds from the given positions.

parameterdescription.para: The positions to get the bounds from.

simplesect.para: A rectangle that contains all positions.

briefdescription.para: Axis-aligned rectangle represented by a top-left position and size.

detaileddescription.para:
Provides geometry utilities such as containment tests, expansion and iteration. Tested:
RectangleTest
